PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amy Grigsby in Propria Persona.

Ms. Grigsby stated that there is a Trust that has real property in it, and that there are bank accounts, mutual funds and air force benefits. The Court advised Ms. Grigsby that she has to provide notice to the creditors and that she can not distribute any money. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for January 22, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for March 18, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
